text: Mira Foods supplied packaged goods to RKS Retail under three invoices issued between November 4, 2025 and December 18, 2025. The total invoice value was Rs. 3,26,000, out of which only Rs. 80,000 was paid. The balance amount remains unpaid even after repeated WhatsApp reminders and email follow-ups. RKS Retail acknowledged the dues in one message and promised payment by January 15, 2026, but no payment was made. Mira Foods has the invoices, ledger, bank entries, and chat history. Mira Foods wants the payment default dispute structured properly for a recovery notice.
